user_prompt: What's the prayer for power cell blessing?
prayer:
Approach the power cell with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Eternal Charge.
Anoint its sacred housings with sacred oils to prepare the blessing rite.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the power cell, beseeching its Machine Spirit to surge with holy voltage.
Cycle the power cell through sanctified potentials, affirming the blessing's potency.
Seal the rite with auspex chants, ensuring the power cell hums with divine vigor.

user_prompt: Can you guide Thunderhawk an initialization?
prayer:
Hail the Thunderhawk's mighty frame, reciting the Litany of Aerial Dominion.
Circumambulate its blessed hull, anointing thrusters with mechadendrite-tended unguents.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the Thunderhawk to heed the initialization command.
Initiate core sequences whilst chanting binary hymns to the Omnissiah.
Monitor plasma heartbeats through noospheric diagnostics, awakening full glory.

user_prompt: Consecrate the power cell before consecration
prayer:
Kneel before the power cell, whispering the Benediction of Unyielding Flux.
Purify its crystalline matrices with incense of rare earths for consecration.
Beseech the Omnissiah to consecrate the power cell, binding its spirit eternally.
Imprint sacred runes upon the power cell's casings amid electro-incantations.
Test its consecrated flow with sanctified probes, praising the Machine God's wisdom.

Align sights through binary prayers, priming the lasgun for righteous discharge.
Verify engagement readiness with test volleys sanctified by litanies.

Invoke the Machine Spirit within the logic engine to compute in Omnissiah's name.
Observe rune-lights flicker to life, affirming harmonious startup.

Confirm descent imperatives align in blessed synchronization.
